site.title: Òtù Na-ahụ Maka Mmekọrịta Mba Nile
site.tagline: Site na mkpa maka nnweta na repo ọha na eze
nav.label: Isi ihe
meta.home.description: IATF na-atụgharị mkpa nnweta nnweta n'ezie n'ime ebe nchekwa ọha na eze na-emeghe.
meta.projects.description: Na-agagharị na ọrụ nnweta ọha na eze nke e bipụtara site na IATF.
meta.propose.description: Rịọ ọrụ nnweta site na IATF site na weebụ, email, ma ọ bụ Discord.
meta.governance.description: Gụọ etu IATF si anabata ọrụ, jikwaa ebe nchekwa, ma mee ka ọrụ dịrị ọha.
meta.join.description: Ụzọ iji sonye na IATF: tinye koodu, sụgharịa, nwalee, ma ọ bụ debe ọrụ.
meta.accessibility.description: Kedu ka IATF si chọọ ime ka webụsaịtị a dị mfe ịnweta yana otu esi akọ akụkọ mgbochi nnweta.
meta.transparency.description: Ihe ndekọ ọha nke IATF: mkpebi, ọrụ, na mmelite na-emeghe na ndabara.
registry.empty.title: E bipụtabeghị ọrụ ọ bụla
registry.empty.body: IATF na-akwadebe ya mbụ ọha oru ngo set.
proposal.form.title: Ziga arịrịọ
proposal.form.body: Dejupụta mpempe akwụkwọ dị n'okpuru iji zipu arịrịọ na IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript dị mkpa iji ụdị weebụ a. Ọ bụrụ na ọ dịghị, jiri email ma ọ bụ Discord kama.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: A naghị edozi ntinye ndụ na gburugburu ebe a. Mpempe akwụkwọ a ga-emepe onye ahịa email gị kama.
proposal.form.ready: Ntinye nchekwa dị njikere. Mgbe ị zigara arịrịọ ahụ, IATF ga-emepụta ndekọ ntinye.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Biko mezue nyocha nchebe spam tupu izipu.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Nchedo spam agwụla. Biko mezue nyocha ọzọ tupu izipu.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Enweghi ike ịchọpụta nchedo spam ugbu a. Biko gbalịa ọzọ.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Oge nchebe spam agwụla. Biko nwalee nyocha ahụ ọzọ.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Biko dejupụta mpaghara achọrọ tupu izipu.
proposal.form.success: A natara arịrịọ gị ma debe ya maka nyocha.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ọ bụrụ na ị kpọtụrụ IATF ọzọ banyere arịrịọ a, tinye ntụaka n'okpuru.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: E nwere ihe mehiere mgbe ị na-ezipụ arịrịọ ahụ. Biko gbalịa ọzọ. Ọ bụrụ na nsogbu ahụ na-aga n'ihu, jiri email kama.
project.detail.eyebrow: Ntinye oru ngo ọha na eze
project.detail.whyTitle: Ihe mere oru ngo a ji dịrị
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Isi mmalite Bekee nkịtị, enwere ike ịgbakwunye ntụgharị asụsụ mgbe e mesịrị
footer.label: Nkwụsị saịtị
footer.blurb: Ọrụ nnweta kwesịrị ịdị mfe ịmalite, dị mfe ibipụta, ma dị mfe ime ka ọ ghere oghe.
footer.source: Nkwupụta nke ụkpụrụ nnweta: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Omume nke ndị na-eji teknụzụ na-enyere aka.
contact.label: Kpọtụrụ
project.status.archived: E debere ya n'ebe a na-edebe ihe ochie
translation.label: Ọnọdụ ntụgharị
translation.source: Asụsụ Bekee bụ asụsụ isi mmalite maka ibe a.
translation.humanReviewed: Onye na-ekwu okwu nke ọma enyochawo nsụgharị a.
translation.machineAssisted: Ntụgharị asụsụ a bụ igwe na-enyere aka ma onye na-ekwu okwu n'ụzọ doro anya enyochabeghị ya. A na-anabata aro site na GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: A tụlere ntụgharị asụsụ a tupu mmelite kachasị ọhụrụ nke Bekee ma nwee ike ịchọ ndozi.
translation.report: Kpọọ maka nsogbu ntụgharị: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ọ dị mma .
